tree.text: Someone I admire: My Uncle Tim

children.text: My uncle Tim is a really great guy.
children.cn: 我的蒂姆叔叔真的是个很棒的人。
children.notes: 'Great guy' is a friendly way to describe a man.
children.statement: 根据本句内容，这句话的中文意思是：“我的蒂姆叔叔真的是个很棒的人。”。
children.explanation: 这是原句“My uncle Tim is a really great guy.”的正确中文翻译。

children.text: He was born in England in 1980, in a city called Halifax, but now he lives and works in Cambodia.
children.cn: 他1980年出生在英格兰一个叫哈利法克斯的城市，但现在他在柬埔寨生活和工作。
children.notes: Halifax is known for its historic Piece Hall.
children.explanation: 在这个句子的上下文中，“born”确实是“出生”的意思。

children.notes: The journey started over a decade ago.
children.statement: 根据本句内容，这句话的中文意思是：“他2014年去了柬埔寨。”。
children.explanation: 这是原句“He went to Cambodia in 2014.”的正确中文翻译。

children.text: My uncle is a doctor and he worked at a hospital in Manchester for a few years.
children.cn: 我的叔叔是一名医生，他在曼彻斯特的一家医院工作了几年。
children.notes: Manchester is a major city in Northwest England.
children.explanation: 在这个句子的上下文中，“doctor”确实是“医生”的意思。

children.text: But in 2014 he decided to go and work in small villages in Cambodia because he heard that they needed doctors.
children.cn: 但在2014年，他决定去柬埔寨的小村庄工作，因为他听说那里需要医生。
children.statement: 根据本句内容，这句话的中文意思是：“但在2014年，他决定去柬埔寨的小村庄工作，因为他听说那里需要医生。”。
children.explanation: 这是原句“But in 2014 he decided to go and work in small villages in Cambodia because he heard that they needed doctors.”的正确中文翻译。

children.text: He travels from village to village to help people.
children.cn: 他从一个村庄走到另一个村庄去帮助人们。
children.notes: 'From village to village' implies a widespread effort.
children.statement: 句中的 “travels” 表示“旅行，移动”。
children.explanation: 在这个句子的上下文中，“travels”确实是“旅行，移动”的意思。

children.text: He has a small motorbike that he uses.
children.cn: 他有一辆他使用的小型摩托车。
children.notes: A practical way to navigate rural roads.
children.statement: 句中的 “motorbike” 表示“摩托车”。
children.explanation: 在这个句子的上下文中，“motorbike”确实是“摩托车”的意思。

children.text: Sometimes, though, he goes in a very small plane because the roads aren't good enough.
children.cn: 不过，有时他会坐一架非常小的飞机，因为那里的路不够好。
children.notes: 'Good enough' means sufficient for the purpose.
children.statement: 根据本句内容，这句话的中文意思是：“不过，有时他会坐一架非常小的飞机，因为那里的路不够好。”。
children.explanation: 这是原句“Sometimes, though, he goes in a very small plane because the roads aren't good enough.”的正确中文翻译。

children.text: Uncle Tim says that he wants to stay there because there is a lot of work to do.
children.cn: 蒂姆叔叔说他想留在那里，因为有很多工作要做。
children.notes: 'A lot of' is a synonym for many/much.
children.statement: 句中的 “stay” 表示“停留，居住”。
children.explanation: 在这个句子的上下文中，“stay”确实是“停留，居住”的意思。

children.text: He has also met a girl there - he told me in an email that they are getting married in July next year.
children.cn: 他还在那里遇到了一个女孩——他在一封电子邮件中告诉我，他们明年7月要结婚了。
children.notes: 'Getting married' is the process of having a wedding.
children.keywords: met a girl, getting married, July
children.statement: 根据本句内容，这句话的中文意思是：“他还在那里遇到了一个女孩——他在一封电子邮件中告诉我，他们明年7月要结婚了。”。
children.explanation: 这是原句“He has also met a girl there - he told me in an email that they are getting married in July next year.”的正确中文翻译。

children.text: Uncle Tim hopes that he can help to teach Cambodian people to become doctors in the future.
children.cn: 蒂姆叔叔希望将来能帮助教柬埔寨人成为医生。
children.statement: 句中的 “teach” 表示“教，教授”。
children.explanation: 在这个句子的上下文中，“teach”确实是“教，教授”的意思。

children.text: He has learned a lot of the language - that can't be easy!
children.cn: 他学了很多语言——那一定不容易！
children.notes: 'That can't be easy' is a common reaction to a difficult task.
children.explanation: 在这个句子的上下文中，“learned”确实是“学习”的意思。

children.text: I said before that he's a great guy. Why do I think that?
children.cn: 我之前说过他是个很棒的人。为什么我这么想？
children.notes: Rhetorical question to introduce the conclusion.
children.statement: 根据本句内容，这句话的中文意思是：“我之前说过他是个很棒的人。为什么我这么想？”。
children.explanation: 这是原句“I said before that he's a great guy. Why do I think that?”的正确中文翻译。

children.text: Well, because he is helping other people and is happy doing that, and because he has learned a lot about another culture.
children.cn: 嗯，因为他在帮助别人，并且很高兴这样做，还因为他学到了很多关于另一种文化的知识。
children.explanation: 在这个句子的上下文中，“helping”确实是“帮助”的意思。
